center.name: 弗格森島
center.summary: 弗格森島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Goldie's bird-of-paradise，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Endemic to Papua New Guinea, the Goldie's bird-of-paradise is distributed in the hill forests of Fergusson and Normanby Island of the D'Entrecasteaux Archipelago, eastern Papuan Islands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: Endemic to Papua New Guinea, the Goldie's bird-of-paradise is distributed in the hill forests of Fergusson and Normanby Island of the D'Entrecasteaux Archipelago, eastern Papuan Islands
